metadata.description: Vertex displacement from heightmap - works in geometry passes

summary: Displaces mesh vertices along normals. Requires tessellation or displacement pass (not standard ShaderGraph).
limitation: Standard ShaderGraph doesn't support vertex modification - requires custom Vertex modifier
workaround: Use normal-based parallax as visual approximation instead of true displacement
compatibility_loss_40_percent: True displacement requires vertex processing; ShaderGraph alone cannot modify geometry
